title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 29.150 - Records not to duplicate those of commissioner of administration — retention and destruction, duties
text:
29.150.  Records not to duplicate those of commissioner of administration — retention and destruction, duties. — The state auditor is authorized to keep such records as may be necessary for the proper performance of his duties; provided, however, that he shall not keep any original records which duplicate the records kept by the commissioner of administration.  He shall file, retain, store and destroy those records in accordance with the state and local records law.
(L. 1945 p. 584 § 26, A.L. 1983 H.B. 713 Revision) 
Records retention and destruction, duties, Chap. 109
